column2: Aspect Memory (#30) User Modeling Scope Task/content facts User identity & preferences save_memory , get_profile , search_context , Tools search_memories ask_about_user Persistence Within agent's storage External service (survives agent resets) Intelligence Keyword/vector search Dialectic Q&A (LLM-powered synthesis) Shared across all agents serving the same Multi-agent Per-agent memory user Update Agent explicitly saves Automatic from conversation analysis trigger Why this matters for pydantic-harness The harness plans Memory (#30) and Observational Memory (#68), but neither addresses: 1. Structured user profiles that persist across agents and sessions 2. Dialectic Q&A — asking complex questions about the user that require reasoning over history 3. Cross-agent user context — multiple agents serving the same user should share understanding 4. External service integration — user models maintained by dedicated services, not embedded in the agent Proposed design class UserModelingBackend(Protocol): """Protocol for external user modeling services.""" async def get_profile(self, user_id: str) -> UserProfile: ... async def search(self, user_id: str, query: str) -> list[SearchResult]: ... async def ask(self, user_id: str, question: str) -> str: ... # Dialectic Q&A async def record_interaction(self, user_id: str, messages: list[Message]) -> None: ... class UserModeling(AbstractCapability[AgentDepsT]): backend: UserModelingBackend auto_inject: bool = True # Inject profile in before_model_request record_interactions: bool = True # Auto-record after each session def get_toolset(self) -> AbstractToolset: return Toolset( get_user_profile=self._get_profile, search_user_context=self._search, ask_about_user=self._dialectic_qa, ) async def before_model_request(self, ctx): if self.auto_inject: profile = await ctx.prefetched.get("user_modeling") # From #107
